steps.t: Gandalf is at the base of Orthanc, considering what to do about the Wizard waiting within.
Treebeard is by the base of Orthanc. Gandalf has asked you to speak with Treebeard while he considers what to do about Saruman.
Treebeard believes you should search within the Ring of Isengard for any sign of your captive friend.
Gandalf is at the base of Orthanc, waiting to hear what you discovered in your search of the flooded Ring.
